title: commercetools Product
description: A product resource in the commercetools Composable Commerce platform. Products contain both a current (published) and a staged version of their data, enabling a preview workflow before publishing changes to the storefront. Product attributes are defined by the associated product type.

id.description: System-generated unique identifier for the product.

version.description: Current version for optimistic concurrency control.

key.description: User-defined unique key for the product within the project.

productType.description: Reference to the product type defining valid attributes for this product.

masterData.description: Container for both current (published) and staged versions of product data.

taxCategory.description: Reference to the tax category used for tax rate determination.

state.description: Reference to a custom state for workflow management.

reviewRatingStatistics.description: Aggregated review rating statistics including average rating and count.

ratingsDistribution.description: Distribution of ratings by score value.

priceMode.description: Whether prices are managed as embedded prices on variants or as standalone price resources.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was created.

lastModifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was last modified.

Reference.description: A reference to another commercetools resource by type and ID.

typeId.description: The type identifier of the referenced resource.

id.description: The system-generated unique identifier of the referenced resource.

KeyReference.description: A reference to another resource using its user-defined key.

typeId.description: The type identifier of the referenced resource.

key.description: The user-defined key of the referenced resource.

LocalizedString.description: A map of IETF language tags to localized string values.

ProductCatalogData.description: Container holding both the published (current) and staged versions of product content.

published.description: Whether a current (published) version of the product data exists.

current.description: The currently published version of the product data, visible in storefronts.

staged.description: The staged version containing unpublished edits awaiting publication.

hasStagedChanges.description: Whether the staged version differs from the published version.

ProductData.description: A complete version of product content including name, slug, variants, and category assignments.

name.description: Localized display name of the product.

description.description: Localized description of the product for display on product detail pages.

slug.description: Localized URL-friendly identifier, unique per project and locale.

categories.description: References to categories this product is assigned to.

categoryOrderHints.description: Map of category ID to decimal ordering hint for custom ordering within categories.

masterVariant.description: The master (first) variant of the product.

variants.description: Additional variants beyond the master variant. A product supports up to 100 variants.

metaTitle.description: Localized SEO title for the product page.

metaDescription.description: Localized SEO description for the product page.

metaKeywords.description: Localized SEO keywords for the product page.

searchKeywords.description: Map of locale to search keyword arrays for the product search index.

ProductVariant.description: A product variant representing a specific purchasable version of a product with its own SKU, prices, attributes, and images.

id.description: Variant ID, unique within the product. The master variant always has ID 1.

key.description: User-defined unique key for the variant.

sku.description: Stock keeping unit identifier for this variant.

prices.description: Embedded prices for this variant, scoped by currency, country, channel, and customer group.

attributes.description: Product attribute values as defined by the product type schema.

assets.description: Digital assets (PDFs, videos, etc.) associated with this variant.

availability.description: Inventory availability information for the variant across channels.

isMatchingVariant.description: Whether this variant matches the current search or filter context (set by product projections).

Price.description: An embedded price for a product variant with optional scoping by currency, country, channel, and customer group.

id.description: System-generated unique identifier for the price.

key.description: User-defined unique key for the price.

value.description: The monetary value of the price.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for geographic scoping.

customerGroup.description: Customer group reference for customer-group-specific pricing.

validFrom.description: Start of the price validity period.

validUntil.description: End of the price validity period.

discounted.description: Discounted price information if a product discount applies.

tiers.description: Volume-based pricing tiers for this price.

Money.description: A monetary value with ISO 4217 currency code and amount in the smallest currency unit.

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

centAmount.description: Amount in the smallest indivisible unit of the currency (e.g., cents for USD).

fractionDigits.description: Number of fraction digits for the currency. Defaults to 2 for most currencies.

Attribute.description: A name-value pair representing a product attribute as defined by the product type schema.

name.description: The attribute name as defined in the product type.

value.description: The attribute value. Type depends on the attribute type (string, number, boolean, LocalizedString, enum, reference, etc.).

Image.description: A product image with URL, pixel dimensions, and optional label.

label.description: Optional descriptive label for the image.
